meaning: n.编穗带者,缝辫机,穗带编织机
examples: Jestina Clayton is an African hair-braider with 23 years of experience.
The string-passing braider is the main equipment to strengthen the inside layer of the rubber piper formed by squeezing out the gum.
This article discusses mainly the resons that the noise creates during the operating of the wire braider and ways to control, and demonstrates the designs for noise eliminating cover in detail.
